title: Nursery Rhyme. DIII. Natural History.
content:
Sneel, snaul,
        Robbers are coming to pull down your wall;
            Sneel, snaul,
            Put out your horn,
        Robbers are coming to steal your corn,
        Coming at four o'clock in the morn.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DIII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
